overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian night market with neon signage, transitioning through industrial interiors, passing a large golden statue, and exiting toward a lit gateway. The environment features dense cyberpunk aesthetics with vibrant neon lights contrasting against dark industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor night market with food stalls and seating

events.description: character walks past seated crowd at red plastic tables and chairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the night market, passing food stalls and seated patrons on both sides

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall with glowing green neon lighting

entered.detail: food vendor stall with bright green neon lighting and cooking equipment
clusters of red plastic chairs and tables where people are seated eating
yellow neon sign with 'OPEN' text glowing above a doorway
metal walkway structure connecting buildings above the street level

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open-air night market illuminated by vibrant neon signs. Food stalls line the path with vendors serving customers, while groups of people sit at red plastic chairs eating and socializing. The ground is uneven dirt and asphalt mixed with debris, and industrial walkways connect the buildings overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching large building entrance

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal large 'RIFF TREAD' and 'SECHO' building signage
character approaches and enters the dark building entrance archway

agents.ego_description: walking toward the building entrance while looking up at the large corporate signage overhead

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign reading 'SECHO' in white letters on building facade
massive red and white neon sign reading 'RIFF TREAD' mounted high on the building
large concrete archway entrance leading into a dark interior space
small blue neon sign indicating ATM services

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open market into a more structured commercial area dominated by large corporate signage. The camera tilts up to reveal the massive 'RIFF TREAD' and 'SECHO' neon signs mounted on the industrial building facade. The character approaches a large dark archway entrance, transitioning from the open street into a covered interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial corridor with ventilation systems

events.description: entering dark interior space with only artificial fluorescent lighting
passing under large industrial ventilation fans on the ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark industrial corridor, navigating around debris and concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow hard hat standing near a work area

entered.detail: large circular industrial ventilation fans embedded in the concrete ceiling
long fluorescent light fixtures providing dim illumination along the corridor
massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the ceiling structure
scattered trash, papers, and broken concrete covering the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed industrial corridor illuminated only by sparse fluorescent tube lights. Large ventilation fans are visible in the concrete ceiling, and massive support pillars line the left side of the path. The floor is littered with debris and trash, and a construction worker in a yellow hard hat stands near a work area on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental corridor with large golden statue

events.description: large golden statue becomes visible on the left side of the corridor
character ascends concrete stairs while passing the golden statue

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs while passing the large golden statue, heading toward a gated exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead through the metal gate

entered.detail: massive golden statue of a muscular figure with outstretched arm mounted on a pedestal
wide concrete staircase leading upward through the corridor
tall black metal gate with vertical bars blocking the exit passage

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens slightly to reveal a massive golden statue of a muscular figure on a pedestal to the left. The character ascends a wide concrete staircase while approaching a metal security gate. The lighting remains dim and artificial, with spotlights highlighting the golden statue against the dark industrial walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular concourse with glass skylight leading to exit

events.description: approaching bright exit light at the end of the circular concourse

agents.ego_description: walking through the circular concourse toward the bright exit gateway

entered.detail: large circular glass and metal skylight in the ceiling allowing some ambient light
bright illuminated exit opening at the far end of the concourse
low concrete seating platforms along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a circular concourse with a distinctive glass skylight in the ceiling, creating a focal point above. Concrete benches line the walls where a few people sit, and the character walks toward a brightly lit exit gateway at the far end. The space feels more open and transitional, serving as a passage between the dark interior and the outside world.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, open-air night market into a stark industrial interior that eventually opens toward a lit gateway. It begins by weaving through neon-lit food stalls and socializing crowds on debris-strewn ground, before moving toward a structured commercial area where the camera tilts up to reveal massive corporate signage. As the character passes through a dark archway, the scene shifts into a dim, enclosed industrial corridor defined by concrete pillars, ventilation fans, and sparse fluorescent lighting. The path then opens to reveal a massive golden statue on a pedestal, with the camera ascending a concrete staircase toward a metal security gate. Finally, the environment expands into a circular concourse under a glass skylight, leading the character away from the dark industrial walls toward a brightly lit exit gateway.
